description: Create a reusable GitHub Actions workflow for building and testing that takes four required string inputs: install-name, os, build, and compiler. The workflow runs on the specified os and only for the flexible-collision-library repository owner. It checks out the code, installs prerequisites based on install-name, creates a build directory, configures CMake with the specified build type, builds the project, runs tests, and installs and uninstalls the project.
